title: Cathar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cathar''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Cathar]]''', a sentient species
*'''[[Cathar (location)|Cathar]]''', the [[homeworld]] of [[Scape Loewig]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]]''', a feline [[Species/Legends|species]]

*'''[[Cathar Honor Sword]]'''
*'''[[Cathar religion]]'''
*'''[[Cathar system/Legends|Cathar system]]'''
*'''[[Cathar Warstaff]]'''
*'''[[Catharese]]'''

*"'''[[Planet Hoppers: Cathar]]'''"
